nl_query: List deadline extension requests where the original deadline was January 2026.
failed_sql:
SELECT de.id, de.original_deadline, de.requested_deadline, de.approval_status, de.approved_at, au.display_name AS approved_by
FROM   deadline_extension_request de
JOIN   exam_schedule_cache esc ON esc.id = de.board_id
JOIN   academic_unit au ON au.id = esc.course_id
WHERE  esc.academic_year = '2026-2027' AND de.original_deadline = '2026-01-01'
ORDER  BY de.approved_at DESC
error: Validation failed (joins): Invalid JOIN: No explicit foreign key relationship exists between 'exam_schedule_cache' and 'deadline_extension_request'. Please review the schema for the correct join path.
